# ROS Global Solutions — Complete Site Documentation

> Total engineering solutions provider specializing in Oil & Gas equipment, HVAC systems (exclusive Bry-Air MENA distributor), Data Center filtration & cooling, and Rhamnolipids bio-surfactants. Based in Sharjah, UAE.

## Company Profile

**ROS Global Solutions FZE** is an industrial engineering company based in Hamriya Free Zone, Sharjah, UAE. We provide specialized consulting and custom product supply solutions across multiple industrial sectors worldwide. Our core differentiator is the ability to supply custom-engineered products to meet any requirement — from standard inventory items to bespoke solutions.

**Contact Information:**
- General: inquiry@rosglobal.com | +971 6 704 1447
- Sales: sales@rosglobal.com | +971 52 730 5496
- Address: 16G-01, Hamriya Free Zone, Sharjah, UAE 52319

**Key Partnerships:**
- **Bry-Air**: Exclusive MENA distributor for desiccant dehumidifiers and gas-phase air filtration
- **AGAE Technologies**: Exclusive MENA distributor for rhamnolipids bio-surfactants

---

## Oil & Gas Equipment

**Category Page:** https://rosglobal.com/oil-gas

Custom-sourced equipment for upstream and midstream oil & gas operations. All equipment specified to exact project requirements, sourced from tier-1 manufacturers worldwide.

### Field Surface Facility — Electrical
**Page:** https://rosglobal.com/oil-gas/field-surface-facility-electrical
Power distribution systems, motor control centres, custom-built control panels (PLC/SCADA/HMI), emergency shutdown systems, fire & gas detection, hazardous area classified equipment, lighting, cable management, UPS, and heat tracing. Certified to NEC, IEC, ATEX, IECEx. For well sites, production facilities, compressor stations, tank farms, and pipeline infrastructure.

### Field Surface Facility — Mechanical
**Page:** https://rosglobal.com/oil-gas/field-surface-facility-mechanical
Centrifugal and positive-displacement pumps, compressors (reciprocating/centrifugal/screw), valves (gate/ball/check/plug), process piping, pressure vessels, separators, heat exchangers, storage tanks, and mechanical seals. All meeting API, ASME standards. For production facilities, gas processing, water injection, pipeline stations.

### Field Surface Facility — Instrumentation
**Page:** https://rosglobal.com/oil-gas/field-surface-facility-instrumentation
Smart transmitters (pressure/temperature/level/multivariable), flow meters (Coriolis/ultrasonic/DP/turbine/vortex), gas analysers, control valves, safety instrumented system components, and wireless monitoring solutions. For flow measurement, pressure monitoring, temperature control, emergency shutdown.

### Drilling — Rig Spaces & Mud Pumps
**Page:** https://rosglobal.com/oil-gas/drilling-rig-spaces-mud-pumps
Triplex/duplex/quintuplex mud pumps, mud pump consumables (bi-metallic liners, rubber pistons, carbide valves/seats), solids control equipment (shale shakers, degassers, centrifuges), rig floor equipment, mud system tanks. Compatible with NOV, Gardner Denver, BOMCO, and other major OEM platforms.

---

## HVAC Solutions

**Category Page:** https://rosglobal.com/hvac

Industrial-grade climate control and air quality solutions. **Exclusive Bry-Air MENA distributor** — world-leading dehumidification and gas-phase filtration at the region's most competitive prices.

### Bry-Air Desiccant Dehumidifiers
**Page:** https://rosglobal.com/hvac/desiccant-dehumidifiers
Bry-Air EcoDry and BrySmart® (IoT-enabled) desiccant dehumidifier series. Tropicalized for Gulf climate (50°C+). Precision humidity control for data centres, pharmaceuticals, cold storage, battery manufacturing, offshore control rooms, food processing. Custom high-volume engineered solutions available.

### Bry-Air Gas-Phase Air Filtration
**Page:** https://rosglobal.com/hvac/gas-phase-air-filtration
Bry-Air DRISORB™ honeycomb chemical filters. Removes H₂S, SO₂, NOₓ, VOCs. Protects electronics from corrosion. Solutions for server rooms, control rooms, hospitals, museums. Custom media formulations for specific contaminant profiles. Assess–Design–Verify approach.

### Celdec Evaporative Cooling Pads
**Page:** https://rosglobal.com/hvac/celdec-cooling-pads
Genuine Celdec (CELdek) cellulose evaporative cooling pads. Cross-fluted self-cleaning design. For gas turbine air intake, industrial warehouses, greenhouses, poultry houses, manufacturing plants. Multiple thicknesses available plus custom sizing.

### Industrial Gas Filters
**Page:** https://rosglobal.com/hvac/industrial-gas-filters
Activated carbon and chemically impregnated media for VOC, H₂S, ammonia, chlorine, and odour removal. Panel filters, cartridge systems, deep-bed vessels. Custom media formulations. Media replacement programs with spent carbon disposal. For oil & gas, petrochemical, wastewater, environmental remediation.

---

## Data Center Solutions

**Category Page:** https://rosglobal.com/datacenter

Specialized filtration, cooling, and environmental control for mission-critical data centre infrastructure.

### Air Filtration Systems
**Page:** https://rosglobal.com/datacenter/air-filtration-systems
Multi-stage particulate filtration: pre-filters, secondary filters, high-efficiency/ultra-high-efficiency final filters, fan filter units. Standards compliant. Energy-optimised low pressure drop designs. Filter monitoring and lifecycle management. Custom filter housings and configurations.

### Chemical Filtration
**Page:** https://rosglobal.com/datacenter/chemical-filtration
Activated carbon chemical filtration for corrosive gas removal. Protects electronics from airborne molecular contamination. Recirculating, fresh-air, and hybrid configurations. Corrosion monitoring (coupons + real-time). Custom media blends. Media replacement programs.

### Precision Cooling
**Page:** https://rosglobal.com/datacenter/precision-cooling
CRAC and CRAH room-level cooling. In-row cooling, rear door heat exchangers. Hot/cold aisle containment. Direct-to-chip liquid cooling, immersion cooling. Free cooling/economiser systems. Energy-optimised for PUE improvement. Custom designs for any heat load.

### Environmental Control
**Page:** https://rosglobal.com/datacenter/environmental-control
Integrated environmental monitoring and management. Temperature, humidity, particulate, gaseous contaminant, airflow, leak, and smoke monitoring. Real-time dashboards, predictive maintenance analytics. DCIM and BMS integration. One-partner solution combining filtration, cooling, and monitoring.

---

## Rhamnolipids Bio-Surfactants

**Page:** https://rosglobal.com/rhamnolipids

Exclusive MENA distributor of AGAE Technologies rhamnolipids. 100% biodegradable bio-surfactants. Applications: Microbial Enhanced Oil Recovery (MEOR), personal care, agriculture, and environmental remediation. Purity grades from 85% to 99%.
